scripts.start:all: concurrently -k -n FRONTEND,BACKEND "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 --app-dir backend"
scripts.start:backend: python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 --reload --reload-dir backend/app --reload-exclude artifacts --app-dir backend
